---
name: Issue
about: Propose a focused task, improvement, or bug fix
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What should change, and why does it matter?

## Background

Add product or technical context. Link related routes, services, UI flows, or prior issues.

## Requirements

- Required behavior
- Compatibility expectations
- Tests or docs that should be updated

## Relevant Areas

- `src/...`
- `client/src/...`

## Acceptance Criteria

- Observable outcome
- Tests/builds pass
- No unrelated scope included

## Notes

Add implementation ideas, screenshots, logs, or examples if useful. Do not include secrets, tokens, private keys, or passwords.
